title: State divergence diagnostics
toast.reportCopied.title: State divergence
toast.reportCopied.body: State divergence report copied to clipboard.
section.summary.title: Summary
summary.bundleArchive: Divergence report archive saved: {0}. Open the logs folder to send this file to the developer.
summary.bundleArchiveFailed: Divergence report archive was not saved: {0}.
section.overview.title: Overview
section.overview.description: Checksum identity, checksum value, and network context.
section.loadedMods.title: Loaded mods
section.loadedMods.description: Runtime loaded-mod set, version, source, and load-order differences.
section.sync.title: Sync markers
section.sync.description: Choice IDs, reward IDs, and the last executed action or hook.
section.creatures.title: Creatures
section.creatures.description: Monster/player combat HP, block, and powers.
section.players.title: Players
section.players.description: Player combat resources, inventory, orbs, and card piles.
section.rng.title: RNG
section.rng.description: Run and player RNG seeds and counters.
section.relicGrabBag.title: Relic grab bags
section.hiddenState.title: No visible state fields differ
section.hiddenState.description: The checksum differs, but the serialized combat state fields available to the diagnostic view match. This usually points to state outside NetFullCombatState, a serialization-only difference, or a mod-owned hidden state.
detail.context: Local context is recorded by this peer; remote context is not carried by the vanilla divergence message.
detail.missingLoadedModInventory: The remote peer did not include the full loaded-mod inventory added by this RitsuLib version.
detail.loadedModsFullList: Complete mod inventory in the game's current runtime load order.
detail.loadedModSetMismatch: Entries shown in this row are present only on that side, compared by mod id and source.
detail.loadedModOrderMatches: Both sides report the same loaded-mod order.
detail.loadedModOrderMismatch: {0} loaded-mod position(s) differ; first mismatch at #{1}.
value.noDifferences: No visible differences in this section.
